de: Ein Toter bei Lawinenabgängen in Tirol. Während des enormen Schneefalls im Osten ist die Lawinengang im West hoch (Stufe vier). Bei mehreren Abgängen wurden Menschen teils schwer verletzt. Ein deutscher Skifahrer starb.
en: One dead in avalanches in Tyrol. During the enormous snowfall in the east, the avalanche rate in the west is high (level four). People were injured in several exits, some seriously. A German skier died.
la: Mortuus in avalanches in Tyrolis. Per nix ingentis in oriente, NIVIS rate in occidente altus est (gradu quattuor). Pluribus exitibus laesus, quidam graviter. Germanus nauta mortuus est.

en: St. Anton: Identity of the dead clarified. After the big avalanche in St. Anton, new details became known on Saturday. The fatalities are an American, a Pole and an Austrian. There were two further avalanches in the variant area of ​​ski resorts on Friday...

en: The victim had to be resuscitated. The great danger of avalanches was also underestimated by winter sports enthusiasts on Saturday. In Serfaus (Landeck district), an off-piste skier was buried in the free ski area and was flown to the Innsbruck clinic in a life-threatening condition. However, there was an all-clear...
